scenario: presentationFor(type) for generic-files types: `script` has a presentation entry (script-source); `document` and `file` are NOT in KNOWN_TYPES → generic fallback. Mirrors renderer/all-types.json's byRelPath shape. SPECIFICATION golden.
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — spec-authored target (future Chunk-2 format-adapter work item).
specSource: docs/design/akm-0.9.0-bundle-adapter-spec.md §2 / §3.4; src/core/type-presentation.ts (TYPE_PRESENTATION['script'] = script-source); src/core/recognition-util.ts (KNOWN_TYPES includes 'script' but NOT 'document' or 'file').
notes: SPECIFICATION golden. `script` IS a known type → renderer 'script-source', action `akm show <ref> -> execute the run command`. `document` and `file` are NOT in KNOWN_TYPES → generic fallback {label:'Asset'}, renderer=null, action `akm show <ref>` (spec §3.4).

FLAG (ambiguity): the spec introduces `document`/`file` as generic-files types (spec §7) but adds no TYPE_PRESENTATION entries for them. Best-reasoned default: generic fallback (searchable, generic render). The adapter author may add `document`/`file` presentation entries (e.g. a knowledge-md-like reader for `document`) — see the methodology doc.

build.sh.action: akm show sample-generic//build.sh -> execute the run command
